name: @slidecenter/desktop
description: Build orchestrator per Live SLIDE CENTER Desktop (Tauri 2 wrapper della SPA apps/web). Sprint J bootstrap + Sprint P (NSIS + updater + signing slot). Non e' un progetto npm classico: espone solo script clean / dev / build / release verso la toolchain Cargo + Tauri CLI installata globalmente.

scripts.release:full: npm run clean && npm run prereqs && npm run build:tauri
